name: Annie Lederman
bio: Annie Lederman is an American stand-up comedian and podcast host whose material often draws on her troubled past, including her struggles with addiction. She came up through the New York and Los Angeles club scenes and has appeared on Chelsea Lately, Girl Code, and the Showtime docuseries The Comedy Store. She hosts the podcast AnnieWood and co-hosted Trash Tuesday.

timeline.ev: Moves to New York City to pursue stand-up and becomes sober
Begins recurring run as a panelist on Chelsea Lately
Launches the podcast Meanspiration, later renamed AnnieWood
